# ImageTagger Copilot Instructions

Use these repository-wide instructions as entry points to more specific rules.

## Instruction Cross-References

- For merge dialog keystrokes, shortcut intent, and key event handling, follow [merge-dialog-shortcuts.instructions.md](instructions/merge-dialog-shortcuts.instructions.md).

## General Rule

When editing areas that have a dedicated instruction file, treat that file as authoritative for behavior and keep implementation and docs in sync.
